candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept exactly.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Also a valid top-line sales label; appears identical to Total Revenue and may be used in some years.
Non-revenue operating item, not sales.
Cost line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the two valid top-line labels as a priority list; later code can use the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line; preferred component label for recent years.
Same direct cost concept with capitalization change for earlier years.
Could be a COGS-related component, but appears empty and less complete.
Valid COGS subtotal, but component purchase rows are preferred when available.

variables.notes: Preferred component rows over the subtotal 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. Included both capitalization variants to capture label changes across years.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component and strong SG&A candidate.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains amortization, which should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.

variables.notes: REVIEWED.Candidate list misses an important overhead bucket: 'Other External Costs', which is present in the A-column preview and appears to be SG&A-type overhead. Added it outside the candidate list because XSGA should use overhead components and exclude amortization lines such as 'Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other External Costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related, but amortization rather than current-period R&D expense.
Explicit research and development expense line; best match.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not current R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not expense.

variables.notes: Used explicit income statement R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Broader finance cost line; useful fallback when explicit interest expense is missing.
Explicit interest expense line; preferred.
Too broad and not specifically interest.
Explicit interest expense label, though preview is blank; valid fallback if populated in other years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail only, not the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list uses explicit interest expense labels first, then broader finance expense as fallback for years where only that line is reported.

candidates.why: Valid total equity line; best available equity measure here.
Same concept with different capitalization; valid fallback.
Not equity alone; full balance sheet total.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is shown on the balance sheet, so total equity is the best available BE mapping.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB; also appears empty.
Correct balance-sheet concept, but appears unreported/empty throughout the preview.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to be reported in the provided statements. Since BE uses total equity here, MIB is set to [] to avoid double counting.
